claims.falsification: schemas/redacted-ref-replay-pass-0027.json is missing, has a different schema or status, reports a different negative fixture count, or has a different seal
claims.text: Pass 0027 created a RedactedRefReplaySet/v1 artifact with status REDACTED_REF_REPLAY_MATCH, negative_fixture_count=9, and seal da9d1c939bcc56eb33711537ab6cd491f8e9e70c91920d3e6a42572b8d985576.

claims.falsification: the source receipt is missing, binds to the wrong path, has a different source SHA-256, schema, seal, raw payload digest, or redacted ref count
claims.text: Pass 0027 binds back to schemas/redaction-boundary-pass-0026.json with sha256 cb4233fcdafb0c35fb7b87ac78dcbc6f7dbec980614049d1fd63f08595757e80, source seal adcdfc1abcdb59427573760f4779182da9f9fde18553c633af5b08fc57f1816c, raw payload digest sha256:8c53911bf4e3763486de4c3dd43a0e1a8a587f3b172e08c322202d1b3fd66ca4, and redacted_ref_count=2.

claims.falsification: the replay contract is missing, reports the wrong schema, source pass, source seal, source SHA-256, raw payload digest, raw material policy, replay verdict, redacted ref count, or contract hash
claims.text: Pass 0027 replay_contract uses RedactedRefReplayContract/v1 with source_pass=0026, source_sha256 cb4233fcdafb0c35fb7b87ac78dcbc6f7dbec980614049d1fd63f08595757e80, raw_payload_value_used=false, raw_payload_material_available_to_replay=false, fresh_replay_verdict=MATCH, redacted_ref_count=2, and contract_hash 4498487ca72ca41e69ebb1fb84a9d2991855ee4537c2b24c77198d2ebc2335f9.

claims.falsification: either redacted ref is missing, lacks a digest ref, marks an unredacted prefix present, has a source/bundle SHA mismatch, or reports a different before/after SHA-256
claims.text: Pass 0027 replay binds before and after redacted refs with matching source and bundle SHA-256 values 32ba5ef8fcc63fb0e7bb2f3d9a84d272693971dcc524f27021fe4ad29d6dc231 and e697e1ecd32c15eec3032b001596cae71021b08808db9d597bbb4a08c6bf8c9f, contains_digest_ref=true, contains_unredacted_sentinel_prefix=false, and source_bundle_sha_match=true.

claims.falsification: the fresh bundle manifest is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, is marked under the repo, has the wrong storage boundary, file count, temp manifest hash, or bundle index hash
claims.text: Pass 0027 fresh_bundle records manifest fixtures/redacted-ref-replay-manifest-pass-0027.json with sha256 47181c707049aea7573282b30cce175f51de014845ca5dd26bd1c933dd208fa3, manifest_seal 2eb54dfc3b6974d35396c2ef597e3eec2ccb1269a88f678ceea976ad34a5f739, bundle_storage_boundary=TEMP_PRIVATE_NOT_COMMITTED, bundle_under_repo=false, file_count=3, and bundle_index_hash 5b7ee765157d297dd17db5f61a7057c1a6a2c315bb03484346cd7d118bbdb32e.

claims.falsification: the raw material policy is missing, marks raw payload value used or required, marks raw material available, fails to require digest refs and redacted refs, or allows the scanner token in model-facing artifacts
claims.text: Pass 0027 raw_material_policy records raw_payload_value_used=false, raw_payload_material_available_to_replay=false, raw_payload_value_required=false, digest_ref_required=true, redacted_refs_required=true, scanner_token_hash=96ec1bf4fc72002389e059a1a237017de7f9b7953a2505121bcdf106f0671ece, and scanner token allowed in model-facing artifacts=false.

claims.falsification: the leak scan plan is missing, includes fewer than nine targets, omits any required model-facing artifact, or the validator reports scanner-token leakage
claims.text: Pass 0027 leak_scan requires scanner-token absence over nine targets and the validator reports MATCH with scan_target_count=9 and sentinel_prefix_leak_count=0.

claims.falsification: negative fixtures are missing, fewer than nine, or any is not marked with expected_validator_status REJECT
claims.text: Pass 0027 defines nine negative fixtures covering raw payload requirement, missing refs, SHA drift, digest mismatch, bundle-under-repo, unredacted scanner-token presence, and source-seal drift; every negative fixture expects validator status REJECT.

claims.falsification: packet 037 is missing, Gather does not verify it, the packet SHA-256 or seal differs, or packet/adversarial files promote production secrecy, scientific discovery, theorem proof, buyer adoption, or a natural law
claims.text: Pass 0027 packet 037 was gathered and verified with SHA-256 bcac13a4ae6d870fcd11ffbea4da24f35a6cdb3826c4dc802f9c6d1b1bb98d3d and digest seal e8d3cb959419e51b9e1b30c9dffc81ffd4feee8107110ad608cd77cd202b680b, while packet 037 and the adversarial steelman preserve the non-promotion boundary.

claims.falsification: schemas/tool-receipts-pass-0027.json is missing, lacks required tool status receipts, treats Forum submit as successful, or omits Telos action receipt and loop ledger receipts
claims.text: Pass 0027 records tool receipts showing Index, Gather, Telos operator/catalog/action receipt/loop ledger, Forum status and ledger verify, and Crucible status as MATCH while preserving Forum submit as UNVERIFIABLE because no model executor is configured.
